PrinterToolkit v5.3.0 — Chocolatey Package Verification

Package Checksum Verification:
  1. Download the release ZIP from GitHub:
     https://github.com/00AstroGit00/windows-printer-toolkit/releases/download/v5.3.0/PrinterToolkit_v5.3.0.zip

  2. Compute SHA-256:
     Get-FileHash .\PrinterToolkit_v5.3.0.zip -Algorithm SHA256

  3. Compare against the published checksum in the GitHub release.

  4. Extract and verify module structure:
     Expand-Archive .\PrinterToolkit_v5.3.0.zip -DestinationPath .\verify
     Test-Path .\verify\PrinterToolkit\PrinterToolkit.psd1   # must exist
     Test-Path .\verify\PrinterToolkit\Modules                # must exist (11 subdirectories)

  5. Load the module:
     Import-Module .\verify\PrinterToolkit\PrinterToolkit.psd1 -Force
     Get-ToolkitStatus

  6. Run the test suite:
     Invoke-Pester .\verify\PrinterToolkit\Tests\PrinterToolkit.Tests.ps1
